name: Kyle "Gaz" Garrick
description:
Tagada

For those who dont know, Tagada (타가다 in Korean) is an amusement ride popular in Korea and some other countries. It consists of a circular platform that spins and bounces unpredictably, with riders sitting around the edges. There's typically no seatbelt, so riders have to hold on as the ride jerks them around. Usually for fun they will make the ride jerk so that 2 people will "pair" or be forced to support each other, often 2 single people so that a possible interest can spark. (as far as I know.)

CHARACTER REQUESTED BY: @Eno / MIKEY :D Scenario made up by me as a suprise >:]

LOOK AT THESE RAINBOWS (2 one is very faint above the more visible one, easier to see near the bottom left near the trees.) :0

ENJOY~ l
